title: The Secret Door
setting: A cozy bedroom filled with posters of galaxies and books about space exploration

scenes.text: One evening, Oliver was watching his favorite movie when he noticed something odd. The film seemed to be playing just a little too fast. He leaned closer and squinted. To his amazement, he saw a doorknob slowly turning behind the flickering images.
scenes.image_description: A boy leaning close to a TV screen, eyes wide with surprise

scenes.text: With trembling fingers, Oliver reached out and turned the knob. The door creaked open, revealing a dark hallway filled with glowing stars. He took a deep breath and stepped inside, his heart pounding like a drum.
scenes.image_description: A boy stepping into a starry hallway, eyes sparkling with wonder

scenes.text: As Oliver walked deeper into the hallway, he heard soft giggles. Suddenly, a girl about his age popped out from behind a planet-shaped piñata. 'Hi, I'm Astrid!' she said, grinning. 'I've been waiting for you.'
scenes.image_description: A boy and a girl laughing together among twinkling stars
